mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.name, g.phone_num AS phoneNum, g.description, g.address, g.file AS file, g.background_img AS backgroundImg, g.br_file AS brFile, g.facility AS facility, IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) AS rating, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS reviewCount FROM GYM g LEFT JOIN REVIEW_GYM r ON g.id = r.gym_id WHERE g.id = #{value} GROUP BY g.id, g.name, g.phone_num, g.description, g.address, g.file, g.background_img, g.br_file, g.facility

SELECT HOUR(start_time) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS visitCount, 100 AS heightPercent FROM WORKOUT_LOG WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND `date` = CURDATE() GROUP BY HOUR(start_time) ORDER BY visitCount DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gym ( user_id, name, background_img, business_registration_num, br_file, phone_num, address, address_detail, postcode, latitude, longitude, description, file, facility, approval_status, gym_code, bank_name, account_number ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{backgroundImg}, #{businessRegistrationNum}, #{brFile}, #{phoneNum}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{postcode}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{description}, #{file}, #{facility}, #{approvalStatus}, #{gymCode}, #{bankName}, #{accountNumber} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name, background_img AS backgroundImg, business_registration_num AS businessRegistrationNum, br_file AS brFile, phone_num AS phoneNum, address, address_detail AS addressDetail, postcode, latitude, longitude, description, file, facility, approval_status AS approvalStatus, gym_code AS gymCode, bank_name AS bankName, account_number AS accountNumber FROM GYM WHERE user_id = #{value}
